title: TC4 golem GUI/container parity batch
implemented: GolemMenu original ContainerGolem slot layout adapter: visible 6 slots, scroll buttons 66/67, player inventory 8/84, hotbar 8/142
GolemScreen uses original guigolem.png texture and original toggle/color button semantics
GolemInventoryContainer exposes golem Inventory NBT slots without changing storage model
ThaumGolemEntity opens GolemMenu through NetworkHooks with entity-id buffer
Original NBT toggles/colors are persisted through toggles/colors arrays
GUI pauses golem AI while open, matching original paused behavior
forge_1_19_2_adapters: ContainerGolem refreshInventory is represented by dynamic visible slots that remap through currentScroll
Original SlotGhost/SlotGhostFluid are approximated as slot limit/filter adapters until full ghost-slot pass
